title: Introduction to ggseg.meshes
text: cortical meshes fsaverage5 resolution: 10,242 vertices 20,480 triangular faces per hemisphere.

title: Introduction to ggseg.meshes
text: SUIT flatmap 2D flattened projection cerebellar cortex 28,935 vertices. Vertex indices cerebellar atlases map directly surface since shares vertex space SUIT 3D pial mesh ggseg.formats (minus 1,078 peduncular cap vertices).

title: Introduction to ggseg.meshes
text: mesh list vertices (data.frame: x, y, z) faces (data.frame: , j, k).

title: Introduction to ggseg.meshes
text: ggseg.meshes installed, ggseg3d::resolve_brain_mesh() can resolve surfaces provided package. means can render atlases surface:
code: library(ggseg3d)  ggseg3d(atlas = dk(), surface = "pial") |>   pan_camera("left lateral")  ggseg3d(atlas = dk(), surface = "white") |>   pan_camera("left lateral")

title: Introduction to ggseg.meshes
text: cortical meshes share face topology (triangle connectivity) inflated mesh ggseg.formats. means vertex indices cortical atlases work surface – vertex index refers anatomical location across pial, white, inflated, sphere, etc. cerebellar flatmap shares vertex indices SUIT 3D pial mesh (indices 0–28,934), cerebellar atlas vertex assignments apply 3D flatmap representations.
code: vapply(available_cortical_surfaces(), function(s) {   mesh <- get_cortical_mesh("lh", s)   c(vertices = nrow(mesh$vertices), faces = nrow(mesh$faces)) }, integer(2)) #>           pial white semi-inflated sphere smoothwm  orig #> vertices 10242 10242         10242  10242    10242 10242 #> faces    20480 20480         20480  20480    20480 20480

title: Additional Brain Surface Meshes for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: Additional brain surface meshes ggsegverse ecosystem. Ships cortical cerebellar surfaces beyond inflated cortical SUIT 3D pial meshes bundled core packages.

title: Additional Brain Surface Meshes for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: cortical meshes fsaverage5 resolution (10,242 vertices, 20,480 faces per hemisphere).

title: Additional Brain Surface Meshes for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: Install ggsegverse r-universe: GitHub:
code: options(   repos = c(     ggsegverse = "https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev",     CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"   ) ) install.packages("ggseg.meshes") # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("ggsegverse/ggseg.meshes")

code: library(ggseg3d)  ggseg3d(atlas = dk(), surface = "pial") |>   pan_camera("left lateral")

title: Additional Brain Surface Meshes for the ggseg Ecosystem

what: Get SUIT cerebellar flatmap mesh — get_cerebellar_flatmap
title: Get SUIT cerebellar flatmap mesh — get_cerebellar_flatmap
text: Retrieves SUIT cerebellar flatmap surface mesh. 2D flattened representation cerebellar cortex, useful visualising cerebellar parcellations without 3D rendering.

title: Get SUIT cerebellar flatmap mesh — get_cerebellar_flatmap
Get SUIT cerebellar flatmap mesh — get_cerebellar_flatmap
text: list vertices (data.frame x, y, z) faces (data.frame , j, k, 0-based indices matching ggseg.formats convention cerebellar meshes).

title: Get SUIT cerebellar flatmap mesh — get_cerebellar_flatmap
text: flatmap z-coordinates near zero (flat projection). Vertex count matches SUIT 3D pial surface ggseg.formats, vertex indices cerebellar atlases map directly mesh.

title: Get SUIT cerebellar flatmap mesh — get_cerebellar_flatmap

what: Get cortical brain surface mesh — get_cortical_mesh
title: Get cortical brain surface mesh — get_cortical_mesh
text: Retrieves cortical brain surface mesh specified hemisphere surface type. surfaces fsaverage5 resolution (10,242 vertices, 20,480 faces per hemisphere).

title: Get cortical brain surface mesh — get_cortical_mesh
Get cortical brain surface mesh — get_cortical_mesh
text: hemisphere "lh" "rh" surface Surface type: "pial", "white", "semi-inflated", "sphere", "smoothwm", "orig"

title: Get cortical brain surface mesh — get_cortical_mesh
text: list vertices (data.frame x, y, z) faces (data.frame , j, k, 1-based indices).

title: Get cortical brain surface mesh — get_cortical_mesh

what: ggseg.meshes: Additional Brain Surface Meshes for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggseg.meshes-package
title: ggseg.meshes: Additional Brain Surface Meshes for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggseg.meshes-package
text: Provides additional brain surface meshes cortical cerebellar visualisation 'ggseg' ecosystem. Cortical meshes include 'fsaverage5' pial, white, semi-inflated, sphere, smoothwm, orig surfaces. Cerebellar meshes include 'SUIT' flatmap surface. meshes follow vertices/faces data frame format used 'ggseg.formats' 'ggseg3d'.

title: ggseg.meshes: Additional Brain Surface Meshes for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggseg.meshes-package
text: Maintainer: Athanasia Mo Mowinckel .m.mowinckel@psykologi.uio.(ORCID)
